nodes.html: I've done several projects with ReactJs and this web site is made with GatsbyJs

I realized several small project

  1. Twitter clone
  2. Facebook messenger clone
  3. Covid-19 tracker
  4. Discord clone
  5. Pokedex

I learned how to

  • 🔗 Consume an API with API requests and axios.js
  • 🚀 Firebase for backend, firestore, hosting and google authentication
  • 🖊 CSS: Flexbox
  • 📚 NodeJs: material-ui, chartjs-linegraph
  • 📚 ReactJs: Redux slice, react-leaflet, react-flipmove
